description: Case dimensions: 25 mm x 20 mm Case thickness: 7 mmDial shape: RectangularSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack leather strap with zippered detail and velcro clasp for comfort and styleBlack coloured dial attached to puller branding at 6 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
